headlines.title: Trump says he’s not thinking about Americans’ finances ‘even a little bit’ in Iran talks
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told reporters on Tuesday that he is not weighing the economic burden of the Iran war on everyday Americans when negotiating a deal with the country’s leadership

headlines.title: Tuesday’s primaries to set up key fall matchups in Nebraska
headlines.description: Tuesday’s primary elections in Nebraska will set the stage for November in a battleground House district, as well as a potentially competitive Senate contest, as Democrats try to win control of Congress.

headlines.title: Comey says DOJ must be the ‘guardian’ of U.S. principles of justice
headlines.description: Former FBI Director James Comey said the Justice Department can’t fulfill its role to uphold the rule of law in the U.S. while it also fixates on those who criticize President Donald Trump.

headlines.title: South Carolina Senate rejects effort to tackle redistricting despite pressure from Trump
headlines.description: The Republican-led South Carolina state Senate rejected a measure to take up a redraw of the state’s congressional map despite pressure from President Donald Trump.

headlines.title: Hallie Jackson interviews former FBI Director James Comey
headlines.description: Former FBI Director James Comey says he will "stand up and defend himself" after he was indicted over a photo of seashells which showed the numbers "8647." Comey tells NBC News' Hallie Jackson that a justice system based on retribution is "not American."

headlines.title: Defunding Planned Parenthood is ‘politically toxic,’ says its CEO
headlines.description: The Supreme Court temporarily extends access to the abortion medication Mifepristone. Planned Parenthood President and CEO Alexis McGill Johnson joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss how Planned Parenthood and providers nationwide, are preparing if the court ultimately lifts the stay.

headlines.title: SCOTUS Voting Rights ruling ignores ‘over 100 years of history’: Congressional Black Caucus member
headlines.description: Rep. Jennifer McClellan (D-Va.), a member of the Congressional Black Caucus, joins Meet the Press NOW as Virginia Democrats ask the U.S. Supreme Court to restore the state’s recently redrawn congressional map. Rep. McClellan also reacts to the Supreme Court ruling on the Voting Rights Act as redistricting efforts intensify in Southern states.

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: FBI interviewing CIA officers in Brennan investigation
headlines.description: The FBI is conducting interviews with current and former CIA officers as part of an investigation into ex-CIA Director John Brennan

headlines.title: The dwindling ranks of the pro-impeachment Republicans: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: The end could come as soon as this Saturday night for Louisiana Sen. Bill Cassidy, one of seven Republican senators who voted to convict President Donald Trump in his January 2021 impeachment trial.

headlines.title: Some Republicans aren’t sold on $1B price tag for Trump’s ballroom project
headlines.description: Senate Republicans got a Secret Service briefing on how the proposed taxpayer funds would be spent. Several said they still aren’t convinced.
